fields.name: event_id
fields.description: Deterministic canonical event identifier from writer contract.

fields.name: source_id
fields.description: Canonical source key (for example binance, fred, or bitcoin_core).

fields.name: stream_id
fields.description: Logical source stream key inside source_id.

fields.name: partition_id
fields.description: Source partition/shard identifier for exactly-once identity.

fields.name: source_offset_or_equivalent
fields.description: Source offset or deterministic source event key.

fields.name: source_event_time_utc
fields.description: Highest-precision source event timestamp when available.

fields.name: ingested_at_utc
fields.description: Canonical ingest timestamp written by Origo writer.

fields.name: payload_content_type
fields.description: Raw payload media type (for example application/json).

fields.name: payload_raw
fields.description: Canonical immutable raw source payload bytes.

fields.name: payload_json
fields.description: Deterministic parsed payload representation derived from payload_raw.
